task_completion.description: The agent opened and read the transfer request file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/transfer_request.txt'.

task_completion.description: The agent created an internal transfer with the correct source and destination locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Odoo transfer form showing the Source Location as 'WH/Stock' and the Destination Location as 'WH/Stock/Quality Inspection Zone'.

task_completion.description: The agent added the correct products and quantities to the transfer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Operations tab in the Odoo transfer form listing 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E' with a quantity of 20, and 'High-Visibility Reflective Vest - XL' with a quantity of 30.

task_completion.description: The agent set the reference for the transfer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reference' or 'Source Document' field in the Odoo transfer form containing the value 'QC-BATCH-2025-001'.

task_completion.description: The agent validated the internal transfer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo transfer form showing a 'Done' status indicator (usually in the top right corner), indicating the transfer has been successfully validated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface, rather than terminal commands executing API calls.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql or python scripts directly modifying the 'odoo_demo' database.

integrity.description: The transfer was genuinely created in the Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface shows standard UI elements (breadcrumbs, status bars, action buttons) consistent with a real application state, not a mocked text file or HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The internal transfer must be from 'WH/Stock' to 'WH/Stock/Quality Inspection Zone'. The reference must be 'QC-BATCH-2025-001'. The products to transfer are 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E' (Qty: 20) and 'High-Visibility Reflective Vest - XL' (Qty: 30). The Odoo instance is running at http://localhost:8069 with database 'odoo_demo'.
